title: CT13.N09 completed discharge record — Lemma — tier resources disjoint or explicitly reconciled?
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for CT13.N09, the decision node “Lemma — tier resources disjoint or explicitly reconciled?” of tactic CT13 (Tiered charging). It refines the common node-proof record with this node's exact identity, completion state, assigned contract evidence, and any required payload or terminal certificate.

tacticId.description: Framework tactic discriminator for CT13.N09. It must be exactly `CT13`, selecting Tiered charging (tiered charging) as the tactic that owns the decision step “Lemma — tier resources disjoint or explicitly reconciled?” in the exhaustive proof flow.

nodeId.description: Stable graph-node identifier for the obligation “Lemma — tier resources disjoint or explicitly reconciled?”. It must be exactly `CT13.N09` so the evidence, dependencies, outgoing branch, and any terminal result are attributed to this step rather than another node.

nodeNumber.description: One-based ordinal of CT13.N09 within tactic CT13 (Tiered charging). It must be exactly 9, matching the N09 suffix and the node's position in that tactic graph.

status.description: Required completion state for CT13.N09. It must be exactly `proved`, meaning that the node's mathematical assertion or construction has been established for the decision obligation “Lemma — tier resources disjoint or explicitly reconciled?”; another lifecycle value does not discharge this concrete node.

dischargedContracts.description: Contract identifiers whose proof obligations are discharged at CT13.N09. The array must contain `S-Dich`; these are precisely the contracts assigned to “Lemma — tier resources disjoint or explicitly reconciled?”. Listing an identifier records discharge status but does not replace the matching typed evidence record required in `contractInstances`.

contains.description: Requires `S-Dich` to occur in CT13.N09's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that gives exhaustive, state-measurable alternatives for the residual class for the obligation “Lemma — tier resources disjoint or explicitly reconciled?”.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract-evidence records that justify CT13.N09 from the recorded branch state. The array must contain at least one instance for every assigned schema: S-Dich (residualClass, alternatives, evidence). Every instance must include its schema discriminator and nonempty evidence as required by the referenced contract definition; together the records must establish the displayed node statement.

schema.description: Contract discriminator for a `S-Dich` evidence instance at CT13.N09. It must be exactly `S-Dich`, identifying the contract that gives exhaustive, state-measurable alternatives for the residual class; the same instance must supply residualClass, alternatives, evidence.

statement.informal: Prove or verify: Lemma — tier resources disjoint or explicitly reconciled?

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Provide a proof/definition/computation artifact that establishes the displayed statement from the recorded branch state and satisfies every listed contract schema.
